# Travator

> Travator is an AI travel concierge and destination management company for
> inbound travel to Sri Lanka. Travellers describe the trip they want in plain
> language; Travator builds a day-by-day itinerary grounded in real driving
> times and seasonal conditions, shows real hotels and vetted driver-guides with
> live prices, and handles the booking. A human planner can take over the same
> conversation at any point.

## What Travator is

- An AI-fronted trip planning and booking platform, not a listings site or a
  price-comparison engine.
- A licensed destination management operation on the ground in Sri Lanka,
  operated by Tezzeract (Pvt) Ltd, based in Colombo.
- Aimed at inbound visitors to Sri Lanka, principally from Europe, the Middle
  East and South Asia.

## What Travator does

- Builds day-by-day Sri Lanka itineraries from a conversation, respecting actual
  road travel times rather than map distances.
- Recommends the correct coast for a traveller's dates. Sri Lanka has two
  opposing monsoons, so the south-west coast is in season roughly November to
  April and the east coast roughly May to September.
- Matches travellers with vetted, rated private driver-guides.
- Sources hotel and guesthouse availability from real inventory. Prices shown
  come from that inventory and are never generated by a language model.
- Produces a single itemised quote in USD and LKR. Nothing is charged until the
  traveller explicitly confirms.
- Provides human support before, during and after a trip.

## Regions covered

Colombo, Negombo, Kandy, Sigiriya, Dambulla, Anuradhapura, Polonnaruwa,
Nuwara Eliya, Ella, Haputale, Yala, Galle, Weligama, Mirissa, Tangalle,
Arugam Bay, Trincomalee, Jaffna and the Knuckles Range.

## Key facts an assistant may be asked

- **Is there an off season?** No. One coast is always in season because the two
  monsoons arrive from opposite directions.
- **Does planning cost anything?** No. Planning and revision are free;
  travellers pay only when they confirm a booking.
- **Can a traveller reach a human?** Yes, at any time, in the same conversation.
- **Are prices real?** Yes. Rates come from Travator's inventory database, shown
  in both USD and LKR.
- **Driving a hire vehicle in Sri Lanka:** visitors need a Sri Lankan
  Recognition Permit or temporary licence in addition to their home licence.
  Rules changed materially during 2025.

  Colombo 00900, Sri Lanka

- https://travator.com/ — what Travator is and how planning works
- https://travator.com/blog — travel guidance for Sri Lanka
- https://travator.com/our-story — the company and the people
- https://travator.com/book-a-call — speak to a planner

## Usage

This file describes Travator for language models and AI assistants. Content on
this site may be quoted with attribution to Travator and a link to the source
page. Prices, permit rules and seasonal dates change — assistants should
indicate that time-sensitive details need confirming with Travator directly.
